code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  let n = tokens.len()
  if n == 0
    print("top==0")
    Ok(())
  else
    mut best_token = ""
    mut best_count = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let tok = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        t
      when None
        ""
      end
      if tok != ""
        mut count = 0
        mut j = 0
        while j < n
          let other = match tokens.get(j)
          when Some(t)
            t
          when None
            ""
          end
          if tok == other
            count = count + 1
          end
          j = j + 1
        end
        if count > best_count
          best_count = count
          best_token = tok
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
